part.text: I’ll inspect the target-side implementation around `RaggedTensorToTensorBaseOp::Compute`, confirm the patch context matches this base, validate the minimal hunk, then apply only that source change.

I’m applying the source patch unchanged at the equivalent location.
Hunk validation succeeded against the target base. I’m now updating the checked-out source file with the validated guard.
